Damian Hinds
MP for East Hampshire

Campaigns

Heating oil in East Hampshire

From Bagpuss to YouTube - what's next for children's TV?

Rupert the Bear, Postman Pat, The Flumps, Super Ted, The Magic Roundabout – all programmes capable of stirring powerful nostalgic memories. But children’s...

Protecting Our Pubs and Shops

I am passionate about pubs, not least because I used to work in the business. I know that pubs are at the heart of the community, or, as we used to say, "the pub is the hub".

Fairer funding for rural schools

I am concerned about the growing financial pressures on schools and the need for a new funding formula that better reflects shifting demographics. In Hampshire...

Digital ID

The government has recently announced plans to roll out digital ID cards. You can read what the government say about their plans here: https://www.gov.uk...

Rural issues in East Hampshire

Farming remains an important part of life here in East Hampshire, both in terms of the local economy but also the contribution to local communities. I maintain...

Support for Veterans

Housing and planning
